intro: Arthrosolen anthylloides, also known as "Bull-thistle" or "Cotton Thistle", is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, wounds, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Arthrosolen anthylloides include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In herbal medicine, Arthrosolen anthylloides is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments for wound healing and skin conditions.
